DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-12-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GREYSTAR REAL ESTATE PARTNERS, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS' RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION AND AN AWARD OF SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFFS' COUNSEL, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS SHALL PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, WITHIN TEN CALENDAR DAYS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFFS IN THE AMOUNT OF $746. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT TOM@THOMASCOHEN.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: TOM COHEN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production And An Award Of Sanctions Against Plaintiffs Counsel
Off Calendar May-12-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GREYSTAR REAL ESTATE PARTNERS, LLC's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs' Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production And An Award Of Sanctions Against Plaintiffs' Counsel.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed Motion is granted. Plaintiffs shall provide verified responses, without objections, within ten calendar days.

Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiffs in the amount of $746.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at tom@thomascohen.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
